title: Who is Charles Lieber? Convicted Harvard scientist now leading China’s research to link the brain with computers
summary_full: Once a celebrated Harvard nanoscience professor, Charles Lieber, convicted in the US for false statements tied to Chinese payments, now leads state-backed brain-computer interface research in Shenzhen. His move to i-BRAIN, a key institute, highlights China's focus on this medically promising yet strategically sensitive field, drawing global attention to his new role.
